areas.name: Downtown Dubai
areas.description: Home to the Burj Khalifa and Dubai Mall. High-end dining and shopping, heavily modern.

areas.name: Dubai Marina
areas.description: A waterfront district with high-rise apartments, cafes, and a beautiful promenade.

areas.name: Deira
areas.description: The old commercial center, known for the Gold and Spice Souks. More traditional and budget-friendly.

areas.name: Bur Dubai
areas.description: Historic district located on the Dubai Creek. Great for traditional food and culture.

areas.name: Jumeirah
areas.description: Coastal residential area with beautiful public beaches, low-rise villas, and luxury resorts.
